title: hymenophyllum poolii
intro: Hymenophyllum poolii, also known as Pool's Scale Fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a small, delicate fern with scale-like fronds that are native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum poolii include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it is often prepared in herbal remedies such as infusions and tinctures.
